# Testament — Section Index
# Source: .claude/llms/testament/llms-full.txt (1101 lines)
# Concatenated from Nim 2.2.8 sources in .nim-reference/

## doc/testament.md — Upstream Documentation (lines 7–398)

### Overview and Setup
- Introduction to Testament: lines 7–16
- Test file locations and paths: lines 23–34
- Commands (pattern, all, category, run, html): lines 36–45
- Options (--print, --verbose, --targets, etc.): lines 48–62

### Running Tests
- Running a single test: lines 65–78
- Running all tests from a directory: lines 81–96
- HTML Reports: lines 98–106

### Writing Tests
- Spec template with all fields explained: lines 109–218
- Inline hints, warnings, and errors (#[tt.): lines 230–268
- Output message variable interpolation ($file, ${/}): lines 270–278
- Cmd variable interpolation ($target, $options, $file, $filedir): lines 280–296
- Unit test examples (reject, ccodecheck, exitcode, output, js, compile): lines 299–398

## testament/specs.nim — Spec Parser (lines 404–928)

### Type Definitions
- TTestAction enum (run, compile, reject): lines 434–437
- TOutputCheck enum (ignore, equal, substr): lines 439–442
- TResultEnum enum (all test outcomes): lines 444–462
- TTarget enum (c, cpp, objc, js): lines 464–469
- InlineError object: lines 470–474
- ValgrindSpec enum (disabled, enabled, leaking): lines 475–477
- TSpec object (all spec fields with types): lines 478–510

### Helpers
- getCmd (default command template): lines 511–516
- targetToExt, targetToCmd constants: lines 518–519
- defaultOptions: lines 521–526
- parseCfgBool: lines 528–534
- addLine: lines 536–539
- extractErrorMsg (inline error parsing): lines 546–660
- extractSpec (discard triple-quote extraction): lines 662–702

### Parsing
- parseTargets: lines 704–712
- initSpec, isCurrentBatch: lines 714–721
- parseSpec (main parser — every valid key and handler): lines 723–928

## testament/lib/stdtest/testutils.nim — Test Utilities (lines 934–1059)

- flakyAssert template (flaky test handling): lines 941–963
- greedyOrderedSubsetLines (nimout matching algorithm): lines 968–993
- enableRemoteNetworking template: lines 995–1000
- disableSSLTesting template: lines 1002–1005
- whenRuntimeJs, whenVMorJs templates: lines 1007–1029
- accept/reject templates (compiles check): lines 1031–1035
- disableVm template: lines 1037–1039
- assertAll macro (VM-compatible assertions): lines 1041–1059

## testament/lib/stdtest/unittest_light.nim — Lightweight Assertions (lines 1065–1101)

- mismatch proc (diagnostic diff output): lines 1068–1097
- assertEquals proc (assert with diagnostics): lines 1099–1101
